rule_metadata.name: Salesforce
rule_metadata.author: Dylan Katz (@Plazmaz)
rule_metadata.description: Generic salesforce Credentials (Created as part of PasteHunter)

rules.rule_text:
rule Salesforce
{
	meta:
		author = "Dylan Katz (@Plazmaz)"
		description = "Generic salesforce Credentials (Created as part of PasteHunter)"
		reference = "https://github.com/techgaun/github-dorks"
		date = "09/15/19"

	strings:
		$ = "SF_USERNAME" nocase
		$ = "salesforce" nocase

	condition:
		all of them
}
